test.note: 11 failures all in uniswap-client, bankr-gateway, venice-client — known pre-existing issues tracked by m4-proxy-test-env-and-runtime-stability-foundation (milestone 4). 634 of 645 tests pass. No milestone-3 test failures.

lint.note: 14 warnings (0 errors). Warnings are react-refresh/only-export-components and react-hooks/exhaustive-deps — no blocking lint errors.

reviewsSummary.reviewMethod: direct-review (subagent spawn failed due to bun-eval parsing error in repo environment — fallback per AGENTS.md guidance)

nonBlockingIssues.description: Integrations.tsx rowMap construction causes useCallback dependencies to change every render (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warning at line 194). Should wrap rowMap in useMemo().

The fromTable() pattern in useSkills.ts bypasses TypeScript Supabase types for ungenerated tables. This is documented and acceptable until types are regenerated, but should be revisited when skills/agent_skills tables are in the generated types.
useOnboardingState upsert uses select-then-update/insert pattern instead of Supabase upsert-on-conflict. Correct but could be simplified.

m3-hermes-registry-and-configuration-flo.summary: Hermes adapter properly registered, selectable in onboarding, produces valid non-empty default config. Tests verify no fallback to process adapter.
m3-hermes-registry-and-configuration-flo.testsCoverage: 10 tests in hermes-registry-and-config.test.ts covering registry resolution, config serialization, and onboarding defaults
